source_pr.title: plan, executor: improve hash join to support all join types
source_pr.body:
1. improve `HashJoinExec` to support **Semi Join**, **Anti Semi Join**, **Left Outer Semi Join** and **Anti Left Outer Semi Join**
2. improve `joinResultGenerator`s
2. `HashSemiJoin` is retained to support `ApplyJoinExec`
3.  add `order by` to some tests to make unit test stable
4. split `ApplyJoinExec`, `HashSemiJoinExec`, `NestedLoopJoinExec` to separate files

symptoms: result = tk.MustQuery(`SELECT * FROM test_gc_read t WHERE t.c in (SELECT t.c FROM test_gc_read t where t.c > 5) order by a`) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: result = tk.MustQuery(`SELECT * FROM test_gc_read t WHERE t.c in (SELECT t.c FROM test_gc_read t where t.c > 5) order by a`) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: result = tk.MustQuery(`SELECT * FROM test_gc_read t WHERE t.c in (SELECT t.c FROM test_gc_read t where t.c > 5) order by a`) (executor/executor_test.go)

files: executor/apply_join.go, executor/builder.go, executor/executor.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/hash_join.go, executor/hash_join_test.go, executor/hash_semi_join.go, executor/index_lookup_join.go, executor/join.go, executor/join_builder.go, executor/join_result_generators.go, executor/join_test.go, executor/merge_join.go, executor/nested_loop_join.go, plan/cbo_test.go, plan/dag_plan_test.go, plan/explain.go, plan/initialize.go, plan/physical_plan_builder.go, plan/physical_plans.go, plan/stringer.go, plan/task.go
